name: Shroudmon

signature_move.name: Kishungouken
signature_move.description: Uses its iron fists, shrouded in an ominous aura, to dish out a combo attack too quick for the eye to see.

description: A Demon Man Digimon that evolved when a certain Digimon tempered its body beyond its limit during unimaginable training. As a result of it just fighting repeatedly like an Asura , it came to be known as the " Fierce God ". Its mind is already broken, and it has even forgotten the reason why it sought strength. It is a genuine combat enthusiast who loves fist fighting, and forces its defeated opponents to get back up. Its Special Moves are using its iron fists, shrouded in an ominous aura, to dish out a combo attack too quick for the eye to see ( Kishungouken ), and reducing its surroundings to ashes with a roundhouse kick covered in flames ( Gokuen Hakaishū ). Its " Garaien Saiha ", in which it fires black flaming energy shots from its held-out palms, boasts the single greatest firepower generated by a Digimon.
